```erlang
-module(solve).
-export([solve/1]).

solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Sieve = generate_sieve(N),
    {SumA, SumB} = lists:foldl(
        fun(I, {A, B}) ->
            case lists:nth(I, Sieve) of
                true -> {A + nums[I], B};
                false -> {A, B + nums[I]}
            end
        end,
        {0, 0},
        lists:seq(0, N-1)
    ),
    abs(SumA - SumB).

generate_sieve(N) ->
    Sieve = lists:seq(0, N-1),
    Sieve1 = lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            if
                I == 0 -> false;
                I == 1 -> false;
                true -> true
            end
        end,
        Sieve
    ),
    sieve_helper(Sieve1, 2, trunc(math:sqrt(N-1))).

sieve_helper(Sieve, I, MaxI) ->
    if
        I > MaxI -> Sieve;
        true ->
            case lists:nth(I, Sieve) of
                true ->
                    NewSieve = mark_multiples(Sieve, I, I*I, N),
                    sieve_helper(NewSieve, I+1, MaxI);
                false ->
                    sieve_helper(Sieve, I+1, MaxI)
            end
    end.

mark_multiples(Sieve, I, J, N) ->
    if
        J >= N -> Sieve;
        true ->
            NewSieve = lists:sublist(Sieve, J) ++ [false] ++ lists:sublist(Sieve, J+1, N - J - 1),
            mark_multiples(NewSieve, I, J + I, N)
    end.

-export([solve/1]).

solve(nums) ->
    Length = length(nums),
    MaxIndex = Length - 1,
    Sieve = generate_sieve(MaxIndex),
    SumA = lists:foldl(fun(I, Acc) ->
